global.title: The UK delivers Europe’s largest vanadium flow battery system
global.summary: London-listed Invinity Energy Systems has delivered 20.7 megawatt-hours of vanadium flow batteries to the Copwood VFB Energy Hub in East Sussex. Once the project enters service later in 2026, Invinity says it will be Europe’s largest vanadium flow battery installation. more…

global.title: The new BMW iX3 costs nearly $1,000 a month to lease
global.summary: Starting at $61,500, the 2027 BMW iX3 is cheaper than the Porsche Macan Electric and offers more range with up to 434 miles. more…

global.title: Duracell taps Driivz to power its new EV fast charger network
global.summary: Duracell is getting into EV charging in the UK, and it’s partnering with EV charging software company Driivz to help run the network. more…

global.title: Ford launches Ford Energy subsidiary to build 20 GWh of battery storage annually
global.summary: Ford has officially unveiled Ford Energy, a wholly owned subsidiary that will manufacture and sell U.S.-assembled battery energy storage systems (BESS) for utilities, data centers, and large industrial customers. The new unit plans to produce 20 GWh of energy storage annually from its Kentucky gigaf

global.title: Around the world in 80 charges: The first electric semi to circumnavigate the globe
global.summary: A German Youtuber who focuses on electric trucking content will drive a Mercedes-Benz eActros around the world, becoming the first to circumnavigate the globe in a heavy duty electric truck. more…

global.title: BYD is upgrading its top selling EVs with 5-min flash charging and nearly 400 miles of range
global.summary: BYD launched its new Flash Charging system, enabling EV charging in as little as 5 minutes, in luxury vehicles like the Denza Z9 GT. Now, it’s rolling out to some of its best sellers. more…

global.title: Velotric GoMad smart utility e-bike bundle deals from $2,125, Anker SOLIX 3,840Wh F3800 power station $1,709 low, EcoFlow, more
global.summary: Our Monday Green Deals are seeing some surprise discounts mixed in, starting with the Velotric GoMad Fat Tire Utility e-bike that is getting its first deals in the form of two varying passenger bundle options starting from $2,125. We are also shining a spotlight on Anker’s SOLIX F3800 series power s

global.title: Kia’s cyber-inspired electric sports car is ‘90% production-ready’
global.summary: It looks like a Lamborghini EV from the future and will likely arrive as an electric successor to the Kia Stinger. Kia unveiled the Vision Meta Turismo concept, a preview of its upcoming futuristic EV sports car. more…

global.title: Former long-time Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins JB Straubel’s Redwood Materials
global.summary: Deepak Ahuja, who served as Tesla’s chief financial officer for 11 years across two separate stints, is joining Redwood Materials as CFO. The move reunites him with Tesla co-founder and former CTO JB Straubel. The hire comes at a pivotal moment for Redwood, which recently laid off 10% of its workfor

global.title: This electric SUV with a semi-solid-state EV batttery costs under $15,000 in China
global.summary: SAIC opened pre-orders in China for the new MG 4X, an electric SUV with a semi-solid-state EV battery, priced under $15,000. The new battery tech is set to launch in Europe by the end of 2026. more…
